benefit_name: Property Tax Exemption for Disabled Veterans
summary: 100% property tax exemption for disabled veterans with 100% disability rating from VA or Texas.
who_qualifies: Texas residents with 100% disability rating from VA or Texas Department of Veterans Commission

benefit_name: Hazlewood Act - Veteran Education Benefits
summary: Up to 150 semester credit hours of tuition/fees waived at public Texas institutions for eligible veterans.
who_qualifies: Military veterans who served in Texas or are Texas residents, honorably discharged

benefit_name: Hunting and Fishing License Discount
summary: Discounted hunting and fishing licenses for disabled veterans. Free license for 100% disabled.
who_qualifies: Disabled veterans with VA disability rating

benefit_name: Disabled Veteran Vehicle Registration Discount
summary: Reduced vehicle registration fees for disabled veterans. Up to 50% discount depending on disability rating.
who_qualifies: Texas residents with VA disability rating

benefit_name: Veteran Hiring Preference in State Employment
summary: Veterans receive preference points in competitive hiring for state positions.
who_qualifies: Honorably discharged veterans applying for Texas state jobs

benefit_name: Welfare and Institutions Code Section 4698 - Property Tax Relief
summary: Property tax relief for disabled veterans. Exemption amount varies by county.
who_qualifies: California disabled veterans with VA disability rating

benefit_name: California State University Fee Waiver for Veterans
summary: Full tuition fee waiver at California State University for eligible veterans.
who_qualifies: Veterans who served in military for a minimum period and attended CSU

benefit_name: Disabled Veteran License Plate Program
summary: Specially designed license plates for disabled veterans. Associated with parking and other benefits.
who_qualifies: California disabled veterans with VA disability rating

benefit_name: California Health Benefits for Low-Income Veterans
summary: Low-income veterans may qualify for Medi-Cal health coverage.
who_qualifies: Low-income veterans meeting Medi-Cal income eligibility
administering_agency: California Department of Health Care Services

benefit_name: California Supportive Housing for Homeless Veterans
summary: Housing assistance programs for homeless and low-income veterans. Prioritizes disabled veterans.
who_qualifies: Homeless or housing-insecure California veterans

benefit_name: Florida Homestead Property Tax Exemption for Disabled Veterans
summary: Up to $50,000 property tax exemption for disabled veterans. Permanent residency requirement.
who_qualifies: Disabled Florida residents with 10% or more VA disability rating

benefit_name: Florida Residency Waiver for Dependent Children
summary: Dependent children of disabled veterans eligible for in-state tuition without residency requirement.
who_qualifies: Children of disabled Florida veterans. Disabled veteran must have 30% or more disability.

benefit_name: Disabled Veteran Motor Vehicle Plate
summary: Special license plate for disabled veterans. Free registration renewal.
who_qualifies: Disabled Florida residents with VA disability rating
administering_agency: Florida Department of Highway Safety and Motor Vehicles

benefit_name: Disabled Veteran Hunting and Fishing License Exemption
summary: Free hunting and fishing licenses for disabled veterans.
who_qualifies: Disabled Florida veterans with VA disability rating
administering_agency: Florida Fish and Wildlife Conservation Commission

benefit_name: New York STAR Exemption for Veterans
summary: STAR (School Tax Relief) program provides property tax relief for homeowners, enhanced for disabled veterans.
who_qualifies: New York homeowners. Enhanced exemption available for disabled veterans.
administering_agency: New York State Department of Taxation and Finance

benefit_name: New York State Veterans Tuition Award
summary: Up to $1,665 per year for eligible veterans attending New York postsecondary institutions.
who_qualifies: New York veterans with 2+ years service, discharged on or after June 15, 1976
administering_agency: New York State Higher Education Services Corporation

benefit_name: New York State Civil Service Veteran Credits
summary: Bonus points added to civil service exam scores for veterans (up to 10 points).
who_qualifies: Honorably discharged New York veterans applying for state civil service positions
disability_threshold: Not required (disabled veterans get additional points)
administering_agency: New York Department of Civil Service

benefit_name: New York Disabled Veteran Registration Plates
summary: Special registration plates for disabled veterans. Includes parking benefits.
who_qualifies: New York disabled veterans with VA disability rating
administering_agency: New York Department of Motor Vehicles

benefit_name: Virginia Property Tax Relief for Disabled Veterans
summary: Up to $25,000 property tax exemption for disabled veterans. Sliding scale based on disability rating.
who_qualifies: Virginia residents who are 100% disabled due to service-connected condition

benefit_name: Virginia Military Survivors and Dependents Education Program
summary: Up to $10,000 annually for dependents of service members killed or disabled in military service.
who_qualifies: Dependent children and spouses of Virginia service members with service-connected death or 100% disability
administering_agency: Virginia Military and Veterans Education Program

benefit_name: Virginia Disabled Veteran Hunting and Fishing License
summary: Free hunting and fishing licenses for veterans with 100% disability rating.
who_qualifies: Virginia residents with 100% VA disability rating

benefit_name: Virginia State Employment Preference for Veterans
summary: Veterans preference in hiring for Virginia state positions. Disabled veterans get additional priority.
who_qualifies: Honorably discharged veterans applying for Virginia state employment
administering_agency: Virginia Department of Human Resource Management

benefit_name: North Carolina Disabled Veteran Property Tax Exclusion
summary: Property tax exclusion for disabled veterans. Amount varies by county.
who_qualifies: North Carolina residents with VA disability rating

benefit_name: North Carolina Education Benefits for Veterans
summary: In-state tuition status for veterans attending North Carolina public colleges and universities.
who_qualifies: Veterans who served 24+ months in active duty or are North Carolina residents

benefit_name: North Carolina Disabled Veteran Motor Vehicle Registration
summary: Reduced motor vehicle registration fees and special plates for disabled veterans.
who_qualifies: North Carolina disabled veterans with VA disability rating
administering_agency: North Carolina Division of Motor Vehicles

benefit_name: North Carolina Veteran Employment Services
summary: Job training and placement services through Department of Commerce for North Carolina veterans.
who_qualifies: Honorably discharged North Carolina veterans and transitioning service members

benefit_name: Georgia Property Tax Exemption for Disabled Veterans
summary: Up to $50,000 property tax exemption for eligible disabled veterans.
who_qualifies: Georgia residents with 100% disability rating and deemed totally and permanently disabled

benefit_name: Georgia HOPE Scholarship for Veterans
summary: Education assistance for Georgia veterans and dependents. Merit and need-based opportunities.
who_qualifies: Georgia veterans meeting eligibility requirements. Dependents of deceased/disabled veterans.

benefit_name: Georgia Disabled Veteran Registration Plate
summary: Special license plate for disabled veterans. Includes parking privileges.
who_qualifies: Georgia disabled veterans with VA disability rating

benefit_name: Georgia Disabled Veteran Hunting and Fishing License
summary: Discounted or free hunting and fishing licenses for disabled Georgia veterans.
who_qualifies: Georgia residents with VA disability rating

benefit_name: Ohio Homestead Property Tax Exemption for Disabled Veterans
summary: Property tax exemption on homestead property for disabled veterans. Amount varies by disability.
who_qualifies: Ohio residents with service-connected disability and homestead property

benefit_name: Ohio War Orphans & Widows Scholarship Program
summary: Full tuition and fees for dependent children of deceased service members attending Ohio institutions.
who_qualifies: Dependent children of Ohio service members killed or totally disabled in military service

benefit_name: Ohio Veteran Hiring Preference
summary: Veterans preference points added to civil service exam scores for Ohio state employment.
who_qualifies: Honorably discharged Ohio veterans applying for state positions

benefit_name: Ohio Disabled Veteran License Plate
summary: Special license plates and registration benefits for disabled Ohio veterans.
who_qualifies: Ohio residents with VA disability rating

benefit_name: Pennsylvania Property Tax/Rent Rebate for Disabled Veterans
summary: Property tax and rent rebate for elderly and disabled residents, including disabled veterans.
who_qualifies: Pennsylvania residents age 65+ or disabled with low income. Disabled veterans any age.

benefit_name: Pennsylvania Veterans Education Program
summary: Educational assistance for Pennsylvania veterans and dependents of service members killed in action.
who_qualifies: Pennsylvania veterans and dependents of fallen service members

benefit_name: Pennsylvania Disabled Veteran License Plate
summary: Special license plate designation for disabled veterans with parking privileges.
who_qualifies: Pennsylvania residents with VA disability rating

benefit_name: Pennsylvania Veteran Hiring Preference
summary: Veterans preference in hiring for Pennsylvania state positions and some local positions.
who_qualifies: Honorably discharged Pennsylvania veterans
administering_agency: Pennsylvania Department of Military and Veterans Affairs

benefit_name: Illinois Property Tax Exemption for Disabled Veterans
summary: Up to $2,500 property tax exemption for disabled veterans with 50%+ disability rating.
who_qualifies: Illinois residents with 50% or more service-connected disability

benefit_name: Illinois MIA/POW Scholarship
summary: Free tuition for dependents of service members classified as MIA or POW.
who_qualifies: Dependents of service members classified as MIA or POW

benefit_name: Illinois Disabled Veteran License Plate and Parking
summary: Special license plate for disabled veterans with free parking in designated areas.
who_qualifies: Illinois residents with VA disability rating

benefit_name: Illinois Veteran Hiring Preference
summary: Veterans preference points for Illinois state employment positions.
who_qualifies: Honorably discharged Illinois veterans
administering_agency: Illinois Department of Central Management Services
